# FocusRunner AI

> AI patient acquisition for med spa acquirers. $2,500 setup + $2,500/mo. 15+ leads in 30 days guaranteed.

## Core Pages
- [Home](https://focusrunner.io/) — AI patient acquisition system
- [Blog](https://focusrunner.io/#blog) — Med spa acquisition & AI marketing guides
- [Free Audit](https://focusrunner.io/#start) — Custom AI automation workflow design
